prefillPrompt: Send me a weekly performance report across all my marketing channels

hero.headline: You don't need a marketing analyst.
hero.subhead: Reports, audits, and campaign changes. All in one message. No hire, no handoff, no waiting.

demo.content: Send me the weekly performance report
Pulling Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4 last 7 days...
Aggregating spend, conversions, and revenue across all channels...

**Weekly Performance Report, June 1-7**

| Channel | Spend | Conversions | CPA | vs Last Week |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Meta Ads | $8,440 | 112 | $75.40 | CPA +12% |
| Google Ads | $5,880 | 74 | $79.50 | CPA -8% |
| **Total** | **$14,320** | **186** | **$77.00** | |

---

**This week's flags:**
- Meta CPA up 12%. 2 ad sets driving the increase: "Lookalike 2%" ($2,100, 11 conversions) and "Interest: Fitness" ($1,800, 8 conversions). Both above target CPA of $60.
- Google Brand campaign efficiency improved. Top converting keyword: "toffu marketing AI" (32 conversions, $22 CPA).
- Total revenue attributed in GA4: $41,200. Blended ROAS: 2.88x.

Want me to pause the 2 underperforming Meta ad sets and reallocate budget to Google Brand?

findings.title: Everything your analyst does. Faster and always on.

items.title: Weekly performance reports
items.desc: Cross-channel report across Meta, Google Ads, and GA4 every Monday morning in Slack. Spend, conversions, CPA, ROAS. No spreadsheet, no waiting.

items.title: Campaign audits on demand
items.desc: Ask Toffu to audit any campaign at any time. It reads the actual data, finds the waste, and tells you exactly what to change.

items.title: Anomaly detection
items.desc: CPA spiked overnight. Spend hit zero. Toffu catches it and pings you before you lose a full day of budget.

items.title: Budget pacing
items.desc: Mid-month check: are you on track to hit budget? Toffu pulls current spend, projects end-of-month, and flags if you need to adjust.

items.title: Cross-channel attribution
items.desc: Where did your revenue actually come from? Toffu joins your ad platform data with GA4 to give you a real answer, not a platform-biased one.

items.title: Optimization recommendations
items.desc: Not just data. Toffu tells you which campaigns to pause, which to scale, and which creatives to replace, with the numbers to back it up.

steps.title: Connect your ad accounts
steps.desc: Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4 in under 5 minutes. Toffu reads live data from every account, not exports or samples.

steps.title: Ask or schedule
steps.desc: Ask a one-off question or set up a recurring report. Weekly summaries, daily anomaly checks, mid-month pacing. All in Slack.

steps.title: Approve and execute
steps.desc: Toffu surfaces what needs fixing and asks if you want it done. One reply and it's handled. No tickets, no meetings.

afterSection.title: What your team gets back
afterSection.subhead: Stop spending hours on reporting. Start spending time on strategy.

items.title: 3-5 hours back per week
items.desc: The average marketing analyst spends half their time pulling and formatting data. Toffu does that in seconds.

items.title: Same-day campaign fixes
items.desc: No more waiting for the weekly review to catch a problem that started Monday. Toffu flags it the same day.

items.title: No context switching
items.desc: One place for all your channel data. No logging into 4 platforms to answer one question.

faq.question: Can Toffu replace a full-time analyst?
faq.answer: For reporting, monitoring, and optimization recommendations, yes. Toffu does the data work. Your team focuses on strategy and creative.

faq.question: What channels does it cover?
faq.answer: Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4, Google Search Console, Bing Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and more. All in a single query.

faq.question: Can I schedule recurring reports?
faq.answer: Yes. Set up daily, weekly, or monthly reports to any Slack channel. Toffu sends them automatically with no manual trigger.

faq.question: Does it just report or can it make changes?
faq.answer: Both. Toffu can pause campaigns, adjust bids, and reallocate budget. You control how much autonomy it has.

faq.question: How accurate is the data?
faq.answer: Toffu pulls directly from the platform APIs. The numbers are the same ones you would see logging into Meta Ads Manager or Google Ads.

finalCta.title: Your analyst is spending hours on work Toffu does in seconds.
finalCta.subhead: Every week, someone on your team is manually pulling data, formatting spreadsheets, and writing reports. That time is gone. Toffu gives it back.

seo.title: AI Marketing Analyst | Toffu
seo.description: Toffu does the work of a marketing analyst. Reports, audits, anomaly detection, and campaign changes across Meta Ads, Google Ads, and GA4.
seo.ogDescription: Reports, audits, and campaign changes in one message. No hire needed.
